data.body:
Integration is where #psychedelic work becomes real life. 
Insights can feel powerful in the moment, but their value emerges through steady daily practice, reflection, and grounded habits.

Journaling, meditation, and mindful routines help turn experiences into lived change over time. 

Link in bio.
